_publications._publicationTitle: Testing ATRA and MEK inhibitor PD0325901 effectiveness in a nude mouse model for human MPNST xenografts.

_contextSnippet: Nuclear expression of Ki-67 reached 40–45%...A high Ki-67 labelling index of 45% was determined by MIB-1 staining
details: Nuclear expression reached 40-45% in S462 xenografts, with high Ki-67 labelling index of 45% determined by MIB-1 staining
